Fusion Core API ReferenceTechnical Specification for Fusion Core v1.0This document provides the technical signatures and behaviours for the core utilities in both ecosystems.TypeScript Ecosystem (fusion-ts)GuardDefensive programming utilities to enforce the Hybrid Standard.static required<T>(value: T | null, name: string): TBehavior: Throws Error if value is null or undefined. Returns value otherwise.Use Case: Validating non-optional configuration parameters.static isHybridKeyBundle(bundle: any): booleanBehavior: The 50/50 Check. Returns true if and only if the object contains valid classical (ECC) and quantum (Lattice) key structures.Use Case: Handshake validation.static byteLength(buffer: Uint8Array, expected: number, name: string): voidBehavior: Throws Error if buffer.byteLength !== expected.Use Case: Validating SHA-256 hashes (32 bytes) or AES keys.Result<T, E>A Discriminated Union for flow control, replacing Exceptions.ok(value: T): Result<T, E>Creates a Success variant.err(error: E): Result<T, E>Creates a Failure variant.map<U>(fn: (v: T) => U): Result<U, E>Applies fn to the value if Ok, otherwise returns the original Err.unwrap(): TReturns the value or throws the error (unsafe, use with caution).Task<T>Observability wrapper for Promises.static from(name: string, fn: () => Promise<T>): Task<T>Wraps a promise factory. Automatically starts a Telemetry Span with the given name.run(): Promise<Result<T, Error>>Executes the task, catches any exceptions (converting them to Err), and stops the Telemetry timer.Java Ecosystem (fusion-java)TelemetryObservability standard for the backend.static <T> T measure(String name, FunctionWithSpan<T> fn)Executes fn inside a timed span.static <C, Q> HybridResult<C, Q> measureHybrid(String name, Supplier<C> classical, Supplier<Q> quantum)Core Metric Tool. Runs both suppliers, measures them individually, and calculates the delta (Quantum Cost vs Classical Cost).Returns: HybridResult containing both outputs and the Metrics record.AsyncResult<T>Future-based Result wrapper for non-blocking I/O.static <T> AsyncResult<T> from(String name, Supplier<T> fn)Offloads fn to a generic thread pool (via CompletableFuture.supplyAsync) and wraps it in a Telemetry Span.join(): Result<T, Exception>Blocks until completion and returns a type-safe Result.toFuture(): CompletableFuture<Result<T, Exception>>Returns the underlying future for non-blocking chaining.GuardJava-side validation.static void validateHybridStructure(Object classical, Object quantum)Behavior: Throws IllegalArgumentException if either argument is null.static void byteLength(byte[] array, int expected, String name)Behavior: Throws SecurityException if array.length != expected.
